steps.title: Identify the key claim
steps.content: The passage states that Gloria Richardson was the leader of what became known as the Cambridge movement.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly states that she led the Cambridge movement, matching the passage's statement that she was the leader of what became known as the Cambridge movement.
The other choices either describe unrelated activities (a business, environmental protests, her daughter's school) that are never mentioned in the passage.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
